# next()

**Instance Method**

Asynchronously advances to the next element and returns it, or ends the sequence if there is no next element.

## Declaration

```swift
mutating func next() async throws -> ManagedPackageLibrary.ManagedPackages.AsyncIterator.Element?
```
title: next()
